creator: don@siad.net
text:
PCI-to-PCI bridge for bus three seems to be misconfigured so devices on bus
3 are not found.
This did work back in march 2007.

IS:
pcib3:   no prefetched decode
SHOUD BE:
pcib3:   prefetched decode 0xfff00000-0xfffff

Maybe caused by following errors?
acpi0: reservation of 0, a0000 (3) failed
acpi0: reservation of 100000, 7f00000 (3) failed
